content: The half-life of Tantalum-180m is approximately 8.15 hours. This metastable state of Tantalum-180 decays through isomeric transition to the ground state of Tantalum-180.
raw_content: The half-life of Tantalum-180m is approximately 8.15 hours. This metastable state of Tantalum-180 decays through isomeric transition to the ground state of Tantalum-180.
